summary: Comprehensive testing of PO Reports Dashboard. All features working correctly - Backend APIs (enhanced-summary, timeline, alerts-panel, alerts) returning correct data. Frontend UI fully functional with summary cards, KPI metrics, alerts panel with resolve buttons, tab navigation, charts (Production Trend, Quality Trend), and approval workflow.
seed_data_creation: Using existing test data from iteration_7 - PO ID: 61bc85e4-8d3c-4d1f-a533-b7c5cfda5bee with 17 reports
context_for_next_testing_agent: PO Reports Dashboard fully functional. All features tested and working: Summary cards (17 Total, 12 Pending, 3 Approved, 2 Rejected, 4 Alerts), KPI metrics (95% Efficiency, 5.8% DHU, 60% Pass Rate, 67.3 Supplier Score), Active Alerts panel with Resolve buttons, Tab navigation (Overview, Production, Quality, Inspection, Tests, Timeline, Supplier Performance), Charts (Production Trend, Quality Trend with threshold coloring), Timeline view with date filters and Missing Report Dates alert, Approval workflow dialog.

enhanced_summary.notes: Returns correct data with KPIs, status breakdown, type breakdown, alerts

timeline.notes: Returns 17 chronological reports with type, status, metrics

alerts_panel.notes: Returns categorized alerts by severity (4 critical) and type

dashboard_loads.notes: PO Reports Dashboard loads correctly with all components

summary_cards.notes: 5 cards showing Total Reports (17), Pending (12), Approved (3), Rejected (2), Alerts (4)

kpi_metrics.notes: 4 KPI cards - Avg Efficiency 95%, Avg DHU 5.8% (red), Inspection Pass Rate 60%, Supplier Score 67.3

active_alerts_panel.notes: Shows 4 Critical alerts with Resolve buttons, alerts categorized by severity

resolve_button.notes: Clicking Resolve successfully resolves alert, count decreases, toast notification shown

tab_navigation.notes: All 7 tabs working - Overview, Production (3), Quality (5), Inspection (5), Tests (4), Timeline, Supplier Performance

production_tab.notes: Shows 3 DPR reports with efficiency %, status badges, Review buttons

quality_tab.notes: Shows 5 DQR reports with DHU %, Critical defect badges, status badges

inspection_tab.notes: Shows 5 inspection reports with PASS/FAIL badges, lot/sample/AQL info, approved/rejected counts

tests_tab.notes: Shows 2 Fabric Test and 2 Trims reports with PASS badges and passed/failed counts

timeline_tab.notes: Shows chronological entries with color-coded dots, date filters, type filter, Missing Report Dates alert (20 missing)

supplier_performance_tab.notes: Shows Test Supplier Co with Overall Score 67.3

production_trend_chart.notes: LineChart showing Target vs Actual output with legend

quality_trend_chart.notes: BarChart showing DHU % with threshold coloring (red for >5%)

review_dialog.notes: Opens correctly with Status dropdown, Comments textarea, Cancel and Submit Review buttons
